changes.summary: Created Phase 2 adapters layer directory tree: trpc/, rest/, mappers/, presenters/, enrichment/, resolvers/ with index stubs; added AdaptersModule composition root and barrel index re-exporting EntityMappers.
Moved EntityMappers implementation from api-v1/common/mappers; updated import paths for domain aggregate and UserFormatter.
Replaced implementation with deprecated re-export from adapters/mappers/entity-mappers for backward compatibility with existing trpc router imports.
Imported and registered AdaptersModule in composition root after DomainModule.

notes: EntityMappers is a static utility class; AdaptersModule scaffold imports DomainModule with empty providers array for future enrichment/resolver/presenter registration (p2-enrichment-scaffold, p2-vote-comment-resolver-adapter). Existing trpc routers unchanged; they continue importing via api-v1 re-export until P-2 retirement.
